title: Dashboard diff JSON schema
commands: grafana-util dashboard diff --url http://localhost:3000 --basic-user admin --basic-password admin --input-dir ./dashboards/raw --output-format json
generalRule: Branch on `kind` plus `schemaVersion` before reading nested fields.
notes: `diffText` carries the compact diff preview for review tooling.
Use `contextLines` to understand how much surrounding diff context was rendered.

title: Alert diff JSON schema
generalRule: Branch on `kind` plus `schemaVersion` before reading nested fields.
The canonical machine-readable flag is `--output-format json`.
`--json` remains a compatibility alias for the same JSON contract.
notes: `status` is the stable routing field for automation.
Older tooling may still look at legacy row-local action vocabulary; prefer `status` for new consumers.

title: Datasource diff JSON schema
commands: grafana-util datasource diff --url http://localhost:3000 --basic-user admin --basic-password admin --diff-dir ./datasources --input-format inventory --output-format json
generalRule: Branch on `kind` plus `schemaVersion` before reading nested fields.
notes: `changes[]` is the field-level drift review surface.
`path` is null for datasource diff rows because the compare key is resource-oriented rather than file-oriented.
